title: Bridge Essay: Cognitive and autonomic determinants of energy homeostasis in obesity.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Heat/Fire** (Phase 3) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Heat/Fire to mechanistic neuroscience through Cognitive, and, autonomic, determinants, of.

**Cognitive and autonomic determinants of energy homeostasis in obesity.** — Nat Rev Endocrinol. PMID: 26122319. DOI: 10.1038/nrendo.2015.103. Obesity ensues from an imbalance between energy intake and expenditure that results from gene-environment interactions, which favour apositive energy balance. Asociety that promotes unhealthy food and encourages sedentary lifestyle (that is, an obesogenic environment) has become amajor contributory factor in excess fat deposition in individuals predisposed to obesity.
